claims: The skill, described as a "waf rule creator" for generating configurations and code, requests the permission `Bash(cmd:*)`, which allows execution of arbitrary system commands. This level of unrestricted system access is excessive and unrelated to the stated purpose of creating Web Application Firewall rules, which typically involves reading/writing configuration files and generating rule syntax, not requiring full shell command execution.
